underlying_goal: Consolidate fragmented memory files across worktrees, sync them via symlinks, research and implement OTEL sampling changes for interpret worker pools, ship the PR, and review an external PR
friction_detail: Initially searched only the current worktree for memory files, missing that they were spread across multiple worktree paths.
brief_summary: User wanted memory consolidation across worktrees with syncing, OTEL sampling research and implementation, and PR shipping — all achieved successfully with the symlink solution and shipped PR.
